spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates exact performance criteria and eligibility metrics with pre-computed properties.

interactive.rationale: Incorporates three separate modules: double-fetch timing probe with savings meters, cross-origin nav simulator, and criteria checklist presets.

edge_cases.rationale: Fetches real networks assets dynamically using no-cors mode and records actual performance.now values.

design_system.rationale: Complex grid layout, mini filling bars, elegant tables.

summary: An outstanding triple-mode demonstrator executing real-world network requests to prove resource caching gains.
